Name: Akamai - Content Purge
Description: Allows to purge content using the Content Control Utility (CCU) v2 REST API.

Parameters.Name: AkamaiClientToken
Parameters.Label: Client Token
Parameters.HelpText: Authentication token used in client authentication. Available in Luna Portal.

Parameters.Name: AkamaiClientAccessToken
Parameters.Label: Client Access Token
Parameters.HelpText: Authentication token used in client authentication. Available in Luna Portal.

Parameters.Name: AkamaiSecret
Parameters.Label: Secret
Parameters.HelpText: Authentication password used in client authentication. Available in Luna Portal.

Parameters.Name: AkamaiObjects
Parameters.Label: Objects
Parameters.HelpText: A comma separated list of objects to purge, either URLs or CPCODEs

Parameters.Name: AkamaiType
Parameters.Label: Type
Parameters.HelpText: The type associated with the items in the Objects parameter

Parameters.Name: AkamaiAction
Parameters.Label: Action
Parameters.HelpText: The action to execute on the purge operation

Parameters.Name: AkamaiDomain
Parameters.Label: Domain
Parameters.HelpText: The Akamai domain to perform the purge operation on

Parameters.Name: ProxyUser
Parameters.Label: Proxy User
Parameters.HelpText: Optional, a user name for the proxy if required in the network

Parameters.Name: ProxyPassword
Parameters.Label: Proxy Password
Parameters.HelpText: Optional, the password for the account to use if a Proxy User was specified

Parameters.Name: WaitForPurgeToComplete
Parameters.Label: Wait
Parameters.HelpText: Indicates if the step should wait for the purge operation to complete

Parameters.Name: CheckLimit
Parameters.Label: Check Limit
Parameters.HelpText: Maximum number of times to check for the purge operation to complete if set to **Wait**
